calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Pamela Cooke for (executor) Audrey Eashman.

Ms. Cooke addressed the courts concerns stating that the heirs and the executor are aware of the accounting not being balanced, the parties are anxious to close the estate, that she is willing to offset the amount of $1,090.81 with her fees, clarified that only two of the units did not have rental income during the account period and referred to the amended schedule B on page 16 of the first supplement. The accounting petition was taken under submission subject to the court receiving a declaration regarding failure to balance the account and a revised order.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Park. (Not Reported)

MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Pamela Leggett for Audrey Eashman, Executor.

Ms. Leggett requested a 30 day extension stating that they had one last delay. Status re: final distribution was continued to August 26, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re: Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-13-2014 Continued To Jul-22-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Pamela Cooke for Audrey Eashman (Executor).

Ms. Cooke stated that she needs additional time/60-days to file a petition for final distribution. Status on final distribution was continued to July 22, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy D. Jones. (Not Reported)
